mapper.select:
SELECT product_id value, product_name label FROM test_product WHERE 1=1
and product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productName},'%')
SELECT product_name productName FROM test_product WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT MAX( SUBSTR( sample_code,9,4 ) ) maxNum FROM test_sample WHERE sample_code LIKE CONCAT('%-',#{year},'-%')
